reasoning: The market estimate was exactly 0.50 on February 20, 2025. Between Feb 20 and the current date of March 2, 2025, there has been no new major official information or credible leaks regarding a delay. Take-Two reaffirmed the "Fall 2025" release window during their February 6 earnings call, and no news since then contradicts this. However, historical precedent with Rockstar Games shows that titles (like GTA IV, GTA V, and RDR2) are almost always delayed, often announced around 4 to 6 months prior to release. Four months prior to Fall 2025 aligns perfectly with the May timeframe (around the time of the next earnings call and this market's May 4 resolution/close date). With the historical base rate of delay being very high, but the most recent official word being confident in a Fall 2025 launch, the crowd's 50% estimate from late February remains highly accurate and well-calibrated. I am adjusting slightly down to 48% to reflect the continued passage of time without any bad news.
